## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Mickey! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Okay
Concierge: Great! The orientation is in the Shiftsmart app and takes about 45 minutes.
Partner: Yes
Concierge: Awesome — to start, look for the In-app orientation card on the Home tab.
Partner: Okay
Concierge: How's it going, Mickey?
Partner: Okay
